title: Marmot
description: A Fabric library to empower customization for server owners.
body:
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ffbf9bff514effa3c08ab401642944f1b1a705d_0.webp)](https://discord.gg/keY4zJ9Xq9)

Marmot is a utility library that empowers server creators by giving them a bucket load of tools to boost their server's experience.

[API Documentation](https://marmot.znotchill.me/)

Marmot provides:
- Custom S->C UI rendering
- Clientside camera manipulation
  - Locking
  - Camera pitch, yaw, and roll
- Clientside FOV manipulation
- Accurate mouse click events
  - Sends updates to the server when you begin clicking and end clicking (useful for real-time click tracking systems)
- "Forceable" keybinds (acceptable & deniable)
- A powerful developer API
- Locked F5
- Forced F5 Perspectives
